'''Ackdool''' was the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Star Cruiser]] [[Mediator (Mediator-class)|''Mediator'']] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]].

==Biography==
Shortly before the outbreak of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Ackdool and the [[Mediator (Mediator-class)|''Mediator'']] were sent to oversee the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] mediation of the [[Osarian-Rhommamool conflict]]. The firebrand [[Nom Anor]] created a plan that would allow him to escape [[Rhommamool/Legends|Rhommamool]], and intensify the conflict. He hid an [[A-wing]] in a [[Missile/Legends|missile]] that was launched at the ''Mediator'' after the nuclear assault had begun. The A-wing held Nom Anor and [[Shok Tinoktin]] inside it and after the missile had been launched, the A-wing detached from the missile and flew away from the heavily damaged ''Mediator''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
